nasb.text: All the gold of the offering which they offered up to the Lord, from the captains of thousands and the captains of hundreds, was 16,750 shekels.

esv.text: And all the gold of the contribution that they presented to the Lord, from the commanders of thousands and the commanders of hundreds, was 16,750 shekels.

cnv.text: 千夫長和百夫長獻給耶和華為舉祭的一切金子，共有兩百多公斤。

ccb.text: 千夫长和百夫长献给耶和华作举祭的金子约二百公斤。
